title: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are
display_title: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are
wikitext:
[]: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Jan 18, 2018 2:15 pm Kinda clickbaity, because I still don't know what they actually mean, but I do think I've figured out what they were GOING to mean. According to the Evangelion Proposal, one of the biggest unused early concepts in Neon Genesis are the ancient ruins of Arqua. Or Arka. Whatever. Anyways, looking at the image of the symbols, they appear to be engraved in charred, flat brick. This is a pretty big stretch, but I think that the First Ancestral Race (if they were even planned to be a thing at that point in development) had something to do with Arqua, and these symbols are some of their markings. Because the opening was made before a lot of changes later in the series (I'm pretty sure, I heard somewhere that the sarin gas attack was part of the reason the ending was changed so drastically from what was proposed), it's likely that this, like a bunch of other imagery seen in the opening, alluded to future events. The symbols look almost like stylized Japanese, but only two of the symbols look like actual kanji, the rest are just lines with circles. However, this also adds to the thought that these may be the markings of the FAR, as crop circles are usually filled with lines and circles. Anything to add? Am I just looking too far into this?

[]: Re: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Jan 19, 2018 5:48 pm I *think* it was the Dead Sea Scrolls and this was confirmed in some production note. Help, O Lords of Source

[]: Re: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 26, 2018 3:28 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: I *think* it was the Dead Sea Scrolls and this was confirmed in some production note. Help, O Lords of Source

[]: Re: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Sun Nov 29, 2020 4:57 am Reichu wrote: The storyboard for the opening refers to the shot as being of angelic script from Seele's Dead Sea Scrolls.

[]: Re: I think I figured out what those symbols in the last shot of the opening are             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 29, 2020 8:00 am Berserkelion wrote: Do you have a reference, Reichu?
